overview: Chill Pill Beverages is a vibrant, fully animated e-commerce website for an Indian beverage brand. Features 3D bottle animations, glassmorphism design, a full online store with cart management, and 6 pages showcasing 6 launch products with Pan India delivery.
features: 3D animated bottles using React Three Fiber
6 product pages: Tangy Orange, Lime & Lemon, Shikanji, Club Soda, Frutu Fizy, Jeera Soda
Full online store with slide-in cart, quantity controls, and order confirmation
Glassmorphism sticky navigation and UI elements
Scroll-triggered entrance animations and floating keyframes
Checkout form with Pan India delivery info
About, Contact, and brand story pages
Mobile-first responsive design with hamburger menu
